title: Wingefors om AI: En möjlighet för branschen
summary_md:
# Wingefors om AI: En möjlighet för branschen

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-24  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

An interview with Lars Wingefors, founder and major owner of Embracer Group and its spun-off gaming companies, covering the gaming industry's post-pandemic hangover from over-investment, high development costs and layoffs, and the opportunity (rather than threat) presented by AI in game development. Wingefors is broadly optimistic about the industry's future and his own pipeline, while noting that GTA 6's launch (late Nov) will push competitors to avoid that window, creating a crowded spring 2027.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟠 EMBRAC-B — Embracer Group | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Founder optimism about strong upcoming pipeline (two big games Feb 2027), valuable IP portfolio (LOTR, Tomb Raider, Dead Island), and AI-driven cost savings — but this is the owner talking his own book.

#### Reasoning

Wingefors frames AI as an opportunity that already aids development and will yield cost savings over 1-2 years, and stresses the under-appreciated value of owning and developing strong brands. He sees a strong year ahead for gamers and confidence in his own slate standing out despite a competitive spring 2027. As founder/major owner his view is positive but inherently biased; no independent analyst conviction is offered.

#### Sell Triggers

- if upcoming flagship releases slip or underperform
- if AI cost savings fail to materialise within 1-2 years
- if spring 2027 competition erodes sales of the two big Feb 2027 titles

> *"Februari där vi släpper två stora spel kommer ju att vara pissig. Februari 2027. Nu tror jag att våra spel är riktigt riktigt bra och kommer kunna stå ut i den mängden"*

---
